name: Deep Dish Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Sprinkle lemon juice over peach slices in a large bowl.
3. Mix together 1 1/4 cups sugar, salt, nutmeg, cinnamon, and flour.
4. Add the mixture to the peaches and toss until evenly coated.
5. Spread the mixture into a 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
6. Dot with butter.
7. Roll out pastry dough and place it over the top of the pie filling, extending at least 1 1/2 inches beyond the edges of the dish.
8. Press the pastry into the edges of the dish and flute them.
9. Cut three vents in the top of the pie.
10. Sprinkle with remaining sugar.
11. Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F, then reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
12. Serve with whipped cream.
